title: StaticBit XRPL MCP — tool catalogue
description: Auto-generated from [McpServerTool] reflection. Each entry mirrors the MCP 'tools/list' response shape: name + description + JSON-Schema inputSchema. Regenerate via: dotnet run --project tools/SchemaGen -- docs/tools-schema.json

tools.name: xrpl_account_delete_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED AccountDelete. The account must have no owned objects (trust lines, offers, escrows, etc.) and Sequence + 256 must be ≤ current ledger sequence. Reserve fee is high — typically 2 XRP — and the residual XRP balance is sent to 'destination'.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

destination.description: Funded destination that receives leftover XRP. Must NOT equal account.

tools.name: xrpl_account_escrows
tools.description: Lists every Escrow ledger object owned by the account. Splits into 'sent' (account is the source/funder, waiting for Finish or Cancel) and 'received' (account is the destination, can call EscrowFinish once FinishAfter passes). Each entry includes counterparty, amount, finishAfter, cancelAfter, condition (if conditional), and the EscrowCreate Sequence (use as offerSequence in xrpl_escrow_finish_prepare / xrpl_escrow_cancel_prepare).

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

marker.description: Pagination cursor returned by the previous call.

ledgerIndex.description: Ledger selector: 'validated' (default), 'current', 'closed', or a numeric ledger sequence.

tools.name: xrpl_account_info
tools.description: Account root data: XRP balance (drops), sequence, flags, reserves.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

ledgerIndex.description: Ledger selector: 'validated' (default), 'current', 'closed', or a numeric ledger sequence.

strict.description: If true, the server checks the account against an STRICT mode (verifies the address).

queue.description: If true, include queued transactions for this account.

signerLists.description: If true, include signer-list ledger entries.

tools.name: xrpl_account_lines
tools.description: Trust lines for an account. Use 'limit' and 'marker' for pagination.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

peer.description: Optional peer address to filter lines to a single counterparty.

limit.description: Page size (max ~400). Omit to use the server default.

marker.description: Pagination cursor returned by the previous call.

ledgerIndex.description: Ledger selector: 'validated' (default), 'current', 'closed', or a numeric ledger sequence.

tools.name: xrpl_account_nfts
tools.description: Read-only: lists NFTs currently owned by an account. Pageable via limit/marker.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

marker.description: Pagination cursor returned by the previous call.

ledgerIndex.description: Ledger selector: 'validated' (default), 'current', 'closed', or a numeric ledger sequence.

tools.name: xrpl_account_objects
tools.description: All ledger objects owned by the account (trust lines, offers, escrows, checks, channels, NFTs, etc.).

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

marker.description: Pagination cursor returned by the previous call.

deletionBlockersOnly.description: If true, return only objects that prevent account deletion.

ledgerIndex.description: Ledger selector: 'validated' (default), 'current', 'closed', or a numeric ledger sequence.

tools.name: xrpl_account_offers
tools.description: Active DEX offers owned by the account.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

marker.description: Pagination cursor returned by the previous call.

ledgerIndex.description: Ledger selector: 'validated' (default), 'current', 'closed', or a numeric ledger sequence.

tools.name: xrpl_account_set_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED AccountSet. Use setFlag/clearFlag to toggle ONE asf flag per transaction (e.g. asfDefaultRipple=8, asfRequireAuth=2, asfRequireDest=1, asfDisallowXRP=3, asfDisableMaster=4, asfNoFreeze=6, asfGlobalFreeze=7, asfDepositAuth=9, asfAuthorizedNFTokenMinter=10, asfDisallowIncomingNFTokenOffer=12, asfDisallowIncomingCheck=13, asfDisallowIncomingPayChan=14, asfDisallowIncomingTrustline=15, asfAllowTrustLineClawback=16, asfAllowTrustLineLocking=17). Domain must be lowercase ASCII hex-encoded.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

account.description: Account whose settings are being modified.

setFlag.description: Optional asf flag to ENABLE (one per transaction).

clearFlag.description: Optional asf flag to DISABLE (one per transaction).

domain.description: Optional domain (ASCII lowercase, hex-encoded; max 256 chars).

emailHash.description: Optional 32-byte hex MD5 of an email address (for Gravatar).

messageKey.description: Optional public key for encrypted messages, hex.

transferRate.description: Optional transfer rate (1_000_000_000 = 1.0, 0 = no fee, max 2_000_000_000).

tickSize.description: Optional tick size for issued offers (3..15, or 0 to disable).

tools.name: xrpl_account_tx
tools.description: Transaction history for an account, paginated via marker. Returns latest first by default.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

ledgerIndexMin.description: Lower bound of the ledger range. -1 means earliest available.

ledgerIndexMax.description: Upper bound of the ledger range. -1 means latest available.

marker.description: Pagination cursor returned by the previous call.

forward.description: If true, return results in ascending (oldest first) order.

binary.description: If true, return raw binary blobs instead of expanded JSON.

tools.name: xrpl_account_tx_since
tools.description: Polling-based account monitor. Returns transactions affecting the account starting from sinceLedger (exclusive) up to current validated ledger. Pageable via 'limit' and 'marker'. The intended pattern: caller stores the highest ledger_index it saw and passes it as sinceLedger on the next poll. Works on cloud/local/HTTP — no streaming required.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

sinceLedger.description: Inclusive lower bound: return transactions from this ledger onward. Pass 0 (default) for 'earliest available'.

marker.description: Pagination cursor returned by the previous call (continue from prior page).

forward.description: If true, return results in ascending order (oldest first) — usually the right thing for monitoring.

tools.name: xrpl_amm_bid_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED AMMBid for the AMM auction slot (discounted trading fee for a period). bidMin/bidMax are LP-token amounts as JSON {value,currency,issuer} where issuer = AMM account. authAccountsJson is an optional JSON array of up to 4 r-addresses: ["r...","r..."].

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

account.description: Bidder account (must hold LP tokens of this pool).

asset1Issuer.description: First pool asset issuer (empty for XRP).

asset2Issuer.description: Second pool asset issuer (empty for XRP).

authAccountsJson.description: Optional JSON array of up to 4 r-addresses authorized to trade at the discounted fee.

tools.name: xrpl_amm_create_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED AMMCreate. Both amounts must be supplied (this defines the initial pool composition). tradingFeeBasisPoints is in 1/10 bps (0..1000 = 0%..1%). Caller pays the full amounts when this lands.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

account.description: Sender account that funds the AMM and becomes initial LP.

amount.description: First asset amount. Drops string for XRP or JSON {value,currency,issuer}.

amount2.description: Second asset amount. Same format as 'amount'.

tools.name: xrpl_amm_delete_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED AMMDelete to fully delete an empty AMM (after AMMWithdraw left residual trust lines). May need to be run multiple times to fully clean up.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

asset1Issuer.description: First pool asset issuer (empty for XRP).

asset2Issuer.description: Second pool asset issuer (empty for XRP).

tools.name: xrpl_amm_deposit_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED AMMDeposit. Provide the pool's two assets and ONE of: (a) amount only — single-asset deposit; (b) amount + amount2 — two-asset deposit; (c) lpTokenOut only — double-asset deposit by LP amount; (d) amount + lpTokenOut — single-asset deposit by LP amount.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

asset1Currency.description: First pool asset — currency code ('XRP' or 3-char / 40-hex).

asset1Issuer.description: First pool asset — issuer. Empty for XRP.

asset2Issuer.description: Second pool asset — issuer. Empty for XRP.

amount.description: Optional amount to deposit (drops string for XRP, JSON token object for issued currencies).

amount2.description: Optional second amount (only with 'amount' for tfTwoAsset mode).

lpTokenOut.description: Optional LP token amount to receive (JSON {value,currency,issuer} where issuer is the AMM account).

ePrice.description: Optional effective price (JSON token object). Used with single-asset deposit.

tools.name: xrpl_amm_info
tools.description: Returns state of an AMM instance — pool assets, LP token supply, trading fee, auction slot. Identify by asset pair OR by AMM account.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

asset1Currency.description: First asset of the pool — currency code ('XRP' or 3-char/40-hex token).

asset1Issuer.description: Issuer of the first asset. Leave empty for XRP.

asset2Currency.description: Second asset of the pool — currency code.

asset2Issuer.description: Issuer of the second asset. Leave empty for XRP.

ammAccount.description: Optional: AMM account address. If set, asset1/asset2 are ignored.

lpAccount.description: Optional: liquidity provider account — when set, returns LP token amount this account holds.

ledgerIndex.description: Ledger selector: 'validated' (default), 'current', 'closed', or a numeric ledger sequence.

tools.name: xrpl_amm_vote_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED AMMVote — LP votes on the desired trading fee of the pool. Vote weight is proportional to held LP tokens. tradingFeeBasisPoints in 1/10 bps (0..1000).

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

account.description: Voter (must hold LP tokens of this pool).

asset1Currency.description: First pool asset currency code ('XRP' or 3-char/40-hex).

asset1Issuer.description: First pool asset issuer (empty for XRP).

asset2Issuer.description: Second pool asset issuer (empty for XRP).

tools.name: xrpl_amm_withdraw_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED AMMWithdraw. Provide the pool's two assets and either lpTokenIn, amount(s), or set withdrawAll=true to redeem all LP tokens.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

asset1Currency.description: First pool asset — currency code ('XRP' or 3-char / 40-hex).

asset1Issuer.description: First pool asset — issuer. Empty for XRP.

asset2Issuer.description: Second pool asset — issuer. Empty for XRP.

amount.description: Optional amount to withdraw (drops string for XRP, JSON token object for issued currencies).

amount2.description: Optional second amount for two-asset withdrawals.

lpTokenIn.description: Optional LP token amount to redeem (JSON token object, issuer = AMM account).

withdrawAll.description: If true, set tfWithdrawAll to redeem ALL held LP tokens (mutually exclusive with explicit amounts).

oneAssetWithdrawAll.description: If true and an amount is provided, redeem all LP tokens via tfOneAssetWithdrawAll for a single asset.

tools.name: xrpl_book_offers
tools.description: Returns the order book (offers) for a currency pair on the XRPL DEX. Use 'XRP' currency with empty issuer for XRP.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

takerGetsCurrency.description: Currency the taker would RECEIVE. 'XRP' or 3-char/40-hex token code.

takerGetsIssuer.description: Issuer for the taker_gets currency. Leave empty for XRP.

takerPaysCurrency.description: Currency the taker would PAY. 'XRP' or 3-char/40-hex token code.

takerPaysIssuer.description: Issuer for the taker_pays currency. Leave empty for XRP.

taker.description: Optional address used as the offer-taker's perspective (for filtering unfunded offers).

limit.description: Page size. Server may cap this value.

ledgerIndex.description: Ledger selector: 'validated' (default), 'current', 'closed', or a numeric ledger sequence.

tools.name: xrpl_check_cancel_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED CheckCancel. Can be sent by the Check's source or destination at any time; by anyone after the Check has expired.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

tools.name: xrpl_check_cash_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED CheckCash. Submitted by the Check's destination. Provide EITHER amount (cash for exactly this amount) OR deliverMin (cash for at least this amount, up to the Check's sendMax). Currency must match the Check's SendMax.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

account.description: Sender — must be the Check's destination.

amount.description: Cash for EXACTLY this amount. Drops string for XRP or JSON token object. Mutually exclusive with deliverMin.

deliverMin.description: Cash for AT LEAST this amount. Drops string for XRP or JSON token object. Mutually exclusive with amount.

tools.name: xrpl_check_create_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED CheckCreate. sendMax = upper bound the sender allows to be debited (includes transfer fees). Same format as xrpl_payment_prepare amounts.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

destination.description: Destination — the only account that can cash the Check.

sendMax.description: SendMax: max amount the Check can debit. Drops string for XRP, JSON {value,currency,issuer} for tokens.

expirationUtc.description: Optional UTC expiration; the Check is invalid after this time.

tools.name: xrpl_clawback_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED Clawback. The issuer claws back its own tokens from a holder. amount.issuer must be the HOLDER (the account to claw FROM), NOT the issuer (the sender). amount = JSON {value,currency,issuer}. value=0 is rejected; if value > holder's balance, the entire balance is clawed. Requires asfAllowTrustLineClawback enabled on the issuer (set BEFORE issuing any tokens).

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

account.description: Sender = issuer (the account that originally issued these tokens).

amount.description: Amount JSON: {value,currency,issuer} where 'issuer' is the HOLDER to claw FROM.

holder.description: Optional Holder (r-address). Required only when clawing back MPT tokens; must be omitted for trust-line tokens.

tools.name: xrpl_deposit_preauth_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED DepositPreauth. Pass EXACTLY ONE of: authorize (grant by address), unauthorize (revoke by address), authorizeCredentialsJson (XLS-70 grant by credential set, 1-8 entries), unauthorizeCredentialsJson (XLS-70 revoke by credential set, 1-8 entries). Only meaningful if the account has asfDepositAuth enabled. Credential entries shape: [{"issuer":"r...","credentialType":"<hex>"}, ...].

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

authorize.description: Address to preauthorize (mutually exclusive with other variants).

unauthorize.description: Address whose preauthorization should be revoked (mutually exclusive with other variants).

authorizeCredentialsJson.description: XLS-70: JSON array of {issuer,credentialType-hex}, 1-8 entries. Holders presenting ALL of these credentials are preauthorized. Mutually exclusive with the other variants.

unauthorizeCredentialsJson.description: XLS-70: JSON array of {issuer,credentialType-hex}, 1-8 entries — revoke a credential-based preauth granted earlier. Mutually exclusive with the other variants.

tools.name: xrpl_escrow_cancel_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED EscrowCancel. Only valid after the escrow's CancelAfter time has passed; refunds the funds to the original owner.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

account.description: Sender of the cancel (typically the original owner, but anyone can cancel after CancelAfter).

offerSequence.description: Sequence number of the original EscrowCreate transaction.

tools.name: xrpl_escrow_create_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED EscrowCreate. amount is XRP drops (string), an issued-token JSON object, or an MPT amount (requires TokenEscrow amendment). Must specify FinishAfter or CancelAfter (or both). Condition (PREIMAGE-SHA-256, hex) makes it a conditional escrow that requires a matching Fulfillment to finish. All times are UTC; they are converted to Ripple-epoch by the SDK.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

destination.description: Destination account that receives the escrowed funds on finish.

amount.description: Amount: drops string for XRP, JSON {value,currency,issuer} for tokens.

finishAfterUtc.description: UTC time after which the destination can claim funds (recipient-side).

cancelAfterUtc.description: UTC time after which the escrow can be cancelled (refund to sender).

conditionHex.description: Hex PREIMAGE-SHA-256 crypto-condition. If set, EscrowFinish requires a matching Fulfillment.

tools.name: xrpl_escrow_finish_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED EscrowFinish. owner is the original escrow funder; offerSequence is the Sequence of the EscrowCreate transaction. For conditional escrows, provide both conditionHex and fulfillmentHex.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

account.description: Sender of the finish (often the destination).

offerSequence.description: Sequence number of the original EscrowCreate transaction.

conditionHex.description: Hex PREIMAGE-SHA-256 condition (must match the escrow). Required for conditional escrows.

fulfillmentHex.description: Hex PREIMAGE-SHA-256 fulfillment matching the condition. Required for conditional escrows.

tools.name: xrpl_fee
tools.description: Returns current open-ledger transaction cost (drops). Use this to size Fee before submitting.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

tools.name: xrpl_gateway_balances
tools.description: Issuer-side balance summary: total obligations (tokens this account has issued and are held by non-excluded addresses), assets held that were issued by others, and balances held by the listed hotwallets. Pass hotwalletsJson as a JSON array of r-addresses to exclude operational/hot wallets from obligations. Strict mode rejects non-r-address inputs.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

hotwalletsJson.description: Optional JSON array of r-addresses to treat as hotwallets and exclude from obligations.

strict.description: If true, only accept r-address/public-key for account.

ledgerIndex.description: Ledger selector: 'validated' (default), 'current', 'closed', or a numeric ledger sequence.

tools.name: xrpl_ledger
tools.description: Returns a ledger header (and optionally its transactions) for the specified ledger.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

ledgerIndex.description: Ledger selector: 'validated' (default), 'current', 'closed', or a numeric ledger sequence.

transactions.description: If true, include the transaction list of the ledger.

expand.description: If true, expand the transactions to full JSON instead of hashes only.

tools.name: xrpl_manifest
tools.description: Returns the validator manifest (publish slot, master key, ephemeral signing key, sequence) for a given public_key. Useful for inspecting which validator is behind a public key seen in 'validations' stream messages. SDK has no typed wrapper for this — dispatched as a generic command.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

publicKey.description: Validator master public key (base58 with 'n...' prefix) or ephemeral signing key.

tools.name: xrpl_nft_accept_offer_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED NFTokenAcceptOffer. DIRECT mode: pass either sellOfferId OR buyOfferId. BROKERED mode: pass both AND optionally a brokerFee (the broker's cut, same format as xrpl_payment_prepare).

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

account.description: Account accepting the offer (the broker in brokered mode).

sellOfferId.description: Sell-offer NFTokenOffer ID (direct sell-accept, or brokered mode).

buyOfferId.description: Buy-offer NFTokenOffer ID (direct buy-accept, or brokered mode).

brokerFee.description: Optional broker fee (brokered mode only). Same format as xrpl_payment_prepare amount.

tools.name: xrpl_nft_burn_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED NFTokenBurn. owner is only needed when burning a token you don't currently hold but are authorized to burn (e.g. issuer burning a tfBurnable NFT).

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

account.description: Account submitting the burn (usually the current holder).

nfTokenId.description: NFTokenID (64-char hex) of the NFT to burn.

owner.description: Optional current owner if different from account (issuer burning a tfBurnable NFT).

tools.name: xrpl_nft_buy_offers
tools.description: Read-only: lists outstanding BUY offers for the given NFTokenID.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

tools.name: xrpl_nft_cancel_offer_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED NFTokenCancelOffer. nftOfferIds is the comma-separated list of NFTokenOffer object IDs (64-char hex each) to cancel.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

nftOfferIds.description: Comma-separated list of NFTokenOffer object IDs (each 64-char hex).

tools.name: xrpl_nft_create_offer_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED NFTokenCreateOffer. SELL offer: set isSellOffer=true and DO NOT pass owner. BUY offer: set isSellOffer=false and pass owner (the current NFT holder). amount uses same format as xrpl_payment_prepare (drops string for XRP, JSON token object otherwise).

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

amount.description: Price the offer GIVES (sell offer) or OFFERS (buy offer). Drops string for XRP or JSON {value,currency,issuer}.

isSellOffer.description: True for sell offer, false for buy offer.

owner.description: Current owner of the NFT. Required for BUY offers; must be omitted for SELL offers.

destination.description: Optional destination — only this account will be able to accept the offer.

expirationUtc.description: Optional UTC expiration time (offer becomes invalid after).

tools.name: xrpl_nft_mint_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED NFTokenMint. uriHex must be hex-encoded (use uriPlain if you have a plain-string URI and want auto-encoding). Flags are a sum of: tfBurnable=1, tfOnlyXRP=2, tfTrustLine=4, tfTransferable=8, tfMutable=16. transferFee 0..50000 (0.000%..50.000%); requires tfTransferable.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

account.description: Minter account (and owner of the freshly minted NFT, unless issuer is set).

nfTokenTaxon.description: NFTokenTaxon (uint32). Group identifier; set 0 if you don't use it.

issuer.description: Optional issuer account, only if account is an authorized minter on behalf of someone else (sets the Issuer field).

transferFee.description: Optional transfer fee (0..50000) for secondary sales. Requires tfTransferable.

uriHex.description: Optional NFT URI as a hex string. Mutually exclusive with uriPlain.

uriPlain.description: Optional NFT URI as a plain string; will be UTF-8-hex-encoded. Mutually exclusive with uriHex.

flags.description: Sum of NFTokenMint flags (tfBurnable=1, tfOnlyXRP=2, tfTrustLine=4, tfTransferable=8, tfMutable=16).

tools.name: xrpl_nft_sell_offers
tools.description: Read-only: lists outstanding SELL offers for the given NFTokenID.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

tools.name: xrpl_offer_cancel_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED OfferCancel transaction. offerSequence is the Sequence number of the OfferCreate to remove.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

offerSequence.description: Sequence number of the OfferCreate transaction to cancel.

tools.name: xrpl_offer_create_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED OfferCreate (limit order on the XRPL DEX). Amounts use the same format as xrpl_payment_prepare (drops string for XRP, JSON {value,currency,issuer} for tokens).

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

takerGets.description: TakerGets — what the OFFER GIVES UP. Drops string for XRP or JSON token object.

takerPays.description: TakerPays — what the OFFER WANTS. Drops string for XRP or JSON token object.

expirationUtc.description: Optional Ripple-epoch expiration (DateTime UTC). Use null for no expiration.

offerSequence.description: OfferSequence of an existing offer to cancel atomically. Optional.

passive.description: If true, set tfPassive (don't consume exact-match offers).

sell.description: If true, set tfSell (exchange entire TakerGets even if you get more than TakerPays).

tools.name: xrpl_path_find_close
tools.description: WebSocket-only. Closes the currently-open path_find subscription on the pool's connection.

network.description: Network identifier — must match the one used in xrpl_path_find_create.

tools.name: xrpl_path_find_create
tools.description: WebSocket-only. Opens a long-running pathfinding subscription on the pool's shared connection. Returns the initial set of alternatives; subsequent updates are delivered to the pool's WebSocket but NOT relayed back through MCP — for ongoing updates, re-poll via xrpl_path_find_status. Only one open path_find request per WebSocket; calling this twice replaces the previous one.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL. JSON-RPC URLs WILL NOT work with this method.

sendMax.description: Optional: maximum the source is willing to spend.

tools.name: xrpl_path_find_status
tools.description: WebSocket-only. Requests an immediate update for the currently-open path_find subscription on the pool's connection. Returns the latest alternatives. No-op if there is no open path_find.

network.description: Network identifier — must match the one used in xrpl_path_find_create.

tools.name: xrpl_payment_channel_claim_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED PaymentChannelClaim. Used by either side to claim XRP and/or renew/close the channel. signatureHex + publicKeyHex are required when the destination is claiming OR when the source is redeeming a signed claim (sign offline via the signer plugin). Pass renew=true to clear the channel's Expiration; close=true to schedule closure.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

account.description: Sender of the claim (source or destination of the channel).

amountDrops.description: Cumulative XRP drops authorized by the signature.

balanceDrops.description: Cumulative XRP drops delivered after this claim (required unless closing).

signatureHex.description: Hex signature over (channelId, amount). Required when destination claims or when redeeming a third-party signed claim.

publicKeyHex.description: Hex public key matching the channel's PublicKey. Required when signatureHex is set.

renew.description: If true, set tfRenew to clear the channel's Expiration (source only).

close.description: If true, set tfClose to schedule channel closure (source or destination).

tools.name: xrpl_payment_channel_create_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED PaymentChannelCreate. amountDrops is XRP drops (string). settleDelaySeconds is the source-side close grace period. publicKeyHex is the secp256k1/ed25519 public key the source will sign claims with — get it from xrpl_wallet_address (publicKey).

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

destination.description: Destination account that can claim from this channel.

amountDrops.description: Amount of XRP in drops (string) to fund the channel.

settleDelaySeconds.description: Settle delay in seconds — minimum wait before source can close with unclaimed XRP.

publicKeyHex.description: Hex public key the source will sign claims with (33-byte secp256k1 or 32-byte ed25519, hex).

cancelAfterUtc.description: Optional UTC time after which the channel auto-closes (immutable).

tools.name: xrpl_payment_channel_fund_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED PaymentChannelFund. Adds XRP to an open channel and optionally bumps its Expiration. Only the source account can fund.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

amountDrops.description: Amount of XRP in drops to add.

expirationUtc.description: Optional new UTC Expiration time (must be later than current expiration + settleDelay).

tools.name: xrpl_payment_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED Payment transaction. Returns autofilled tx JSON + unsigned blob + signing data. Caller signs locally and then calls xrpl_tx_submit_signed. Amount: numeric drops string for XRP (1 XRP = 1000000 drops), or {"value":"...","currency":"...","issuer":"..."} JSON for tokens.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

account.description: Sender address (classic r-address). Server does NOT need its seed.

amount.description: Amount. XRP drops as a numeric string (e.g. '10000000' = 10 XRP) OR token amount as JSON {"value":"...","currency":"...","issuer":"..."}.

destinationTag.description: Optional destination tag (uint32, e.g. for exchange deposits).

tools.name: xrpl_ripple_path_find
tools.description: One-shot cross-currency pathfinder. Returns the alternatives array — every entry has a 'source_amount' you can drop straight into a Payment as SendMax along with its 'paths_computed' as Paths. destinationAmount uses the same format as xrpl_payment_prepare (drops string for XRP or JSON {value,currency,issuer} for tokens). sourceCurrenciesJson optionally restricts what the source can spend: JSON array of {currency,issuer?} objects (max 18).

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

destinationAmount.description: Destination amount: drops string for XRP, JSON {value,currency,issuer} for tokens. Pass value='-1' to ask 'deliver as much as possible up to sendMax'.

sendMax.description: Optional: maximum the source is willing to spend. Same format as destinationAmount. Mutually exclusive with sourceCurrenciesJson per docs.

sourceCurrenciesJson.description: Optional: JSON array of {currency,issuer?} the source is willing to spend (max 18).

ledgerIndex.description: Ledger selector: 'validated' (default), 'current', 'closed', or a numeric ledger sequence.

tools.name: xrpl_server_definitions
tools.description: Returns the binary-format definition tables the node uses (FIELDS, LEDGER_ENTRY_TYPES, TRANSACTION_RESULTS, TRANSACTION_TYPES, TYPES) plus a content hash. Pass the previous hash to short-circuit if nothing changed (server returns empty result). Use this for feature/amendment detection on the node.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

hash.description: Optional content hash from a previous call — if it matches, the server returns nothing.

tools.name: xrpl_server_info
tools.description: Returns rippled node status: version, validated ledger range, build info, peers. Read-only.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

tools.name: xrpl_server_state
tools.description: Machine-readable version of server_info. Returns load factors, validated/closed ledger info, state-accounting buckets, validation quorum, build version. Use this when you need numeric thresholds rather than human strings.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

tools.name: xrpl_set_regular_key_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED SetRegularKey. Pass regularKey=null (or omit) to REMOVE the existing regular key pair. Must not match the master key pair for the account.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

account.description: Account whose regular key is being assigned/cleared.

regularKey.description: New regular key address (classic r-address). Omit to REMOVE.

tools.name: xrpl_sign
tools.description: Signs a transaction with the named wallet's private key. The transaction can be supplied as a JSON object or as an unsigned hex blob (the same value xrpl_payment_prepare returns as 'txBlobUnsigned'). Returns the signed hex blob and its hash — ready to feed to xrpl_tx_submit_signed.

transaction.description: Transaction to sign. Either a JSON object with 'TransactionType', 'Account', etc., OR a hex blob string from a *_prepare tool.

tools.name: xrpl_sign_combine
tools.description: Aggregates several multi-signed partial-blobs into one fully-signed transaction blob. Pass the array of hex blobs produced by xrpl_sign_multi from each authorized signer. Returns the combined signed blob and its hash — ready for xrpl_tx_submit_signed.

signedBlobs.description: Array of multi-signed transaction blobs (hex strings) — output of xrpl_sign_multi from each signer. Accept as JSON array string '["blob1","blob2",...]' or as newline-separated blobs.

tools.name: xrpl_sign_multi
tools.description: Produces a single-slot multi-sign for a transaction. Each authorized signer runs this once; the resulting partial-signed transactions are then aggregated with xrpl_sign_combine before submission. Returns the signed hex blob containing this signer's Signers entry.

name.description: Wallet alias from the keystore — used as one of the multi-sign authorized accounts.

transaction.description: Transaction to sign — JSON object or hex blob. The transaction's SigningPubKey must be empty string for multi-sign.

signingFor.description: Optional: the account this signature is FOR (defaults to the wallet's own classic address). Use this only if the wallet is a Regular Key signing on behalf of a different master account.

tools.name: xrpl_signer_list_set_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED SignerListSet. signerQuorum=0 DELETES the signer list (must omit signerEntries). Otherwise signerEntries is a JSON array of objects: [{"account":"r...","weight":1,"walletLocator":"<optional 64-char hex>"}, ...]. Quorum must be ≤ sum of weights; up to 32 entries.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

account.description: Account that owns this signer list.

signerQuorum.description: Required signer weight sum. 0 = DELETE the signer list.

signerEntriesJson.description: JSON array of signer entries: [{"account":"r...","weight":1,"walletLocator":"<hex>"}]. Required when signerQuorum>0; must be omitted when signerQuorum=0.

tools.name: xrpl_signer_list_status
tools.description: Reads the account's SignerList ledger object and returns multi-sign status: quorum, total available weight (sum of all signer weights), and per-signer breakdown. Pass alreadySignedAccountsCsv to compute the weight already collected and how much more is needed to reach quorum — useful when collecting signatures for a multi-sign transaction.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

account.description: Classic XRP address whose SignerList to inspect.

alreadySignedAccountsCsv.description: Optional comma-separated list of signer addresses that have already signed; used to compute deltaToQuorum.

ledgerIndex.description: Ledger selector: 'validated' (default), 'current', 'closed', or a numeric ledger sequence.

tools.name: xrpl_subscribe
tools.description: Installs a subscription on the pool's shared WebSocket. WARNING: streaming events are not delivered back through MCP — prefer xrpl_account_tx_since for polling-based monitoring. streamsCsv: comma-separated subset of {ledger,transactions,transactions_proposed,validations,manifests,server,peer_status,consensus,book_changes}. accountsJson / accountsProposedJson: JSON array of r-addresses.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

streamsCsv.description: Comma-separated stream names. Empty to subscribe only by account/book.

accountsJson.description: JSON array of r-addresses to subscribe to (validated transactions affecting them).

accountsProposedJson.description: JSON array of r-addresses to subscribe to (proposed + validated, unfinalized).

tools.name: xrpl_trustline_freeze_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED TrustSet that freezes or unfreezes a specific trust line — wrapper over TrustSet with tfSetFreeze/tfClearFreeze (or tfSetDeepFreeze/tfClearDeepFreeze when deep=true). Only meaningful when sender is the token issuer. limitValue defaults to '0' (do not change the trust limit) — pass a positive value only if you also want to adjust the limit.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

holder.description: Counterparty (holder) address — the side being frozen.

deep.description: If true, use DeepFreeze flags (tfSetDeepFreeze / tfClearDeepFreeze) instead of regular Freeze.

limitValue.description: Limit value to set on the trust line. Default '0' — keep current behavior (just toggle the flag).

tools.name: xrpl_trustset_prepare
tools.description: Prepares an UNSIGNED TrustSet transaction to create or modify a trust line. Set limitValue to '0' to remove a trust line (only succeeds when balance and flags are at defaults).

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

account.description: Account that holds the trust line (sender).

limitValue.description: Trust limit value as a decimal string (e.g. '1000000'). Use '0' to attempt removal.

qualityIn.description: Quality in (rate at which received tokens are valued), 1_000_000_000 = 1.0. Optional.

qualityOut.description: Quality out (rate at which sent tokens are valued). Optional.

tools.name: xrpl_tx_decode_blob
tools.description: Decodes a binary transaction blob (signed or unsigned) into JSON for inspection. Pure local operation — no network calls.

tools.name: xrpl_tx_explain
tools.description: Converts a transaction into a one-line human summary for approval prompts. Pass EITHER txBlobHex (signed or unsigned canonical hex) OR txJson (the JSON object directly). Returns {transactionType, humanSummary, txJson} — humanSummary is a sentence like 'Payment from rA... to rB...: 10000000 drops XRP. [fee=12 drops, seq=42, LLS=1234]'. Pure local operation — no network calls.

txBlobHex.description: Hex-encoded transaction blob (signed or unsigned). Mutually exclusive with txJson.

txJson.description: Transaction as a JSON object string. Mutually exclusive with txBlobHex.

tools.name: xrpl_tx_lookup
tools.description: Looks up a single transaction by hash. Returns engine result, metadata and validated flag.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

binary.description: If true, return the binary blob instead of expanded JSON.

tools.name: xrpl_tx_preflight
tools.description: Read-only pre-flight check. Inspects the sender (account_info + server_state) and, for Payment, the destination, to surface common gotchas BEFORE signing/submitting: insufficient balance, insufficient reserve after Amount+Fee, RequireDestinationTag without DestinationTag, DepositAuth without preauth, DisallowIncomingXRP. Pass the prepared transaction as txJson (from a *_prepare tool). Returns a JSON report — { feasible, balanceXrp, reserveXrp, freeXrp, requiredXrp, sourceFlags, destinationFlags, warnings[] }. NOT a guarantee — does not check path liquidity or AMM state.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

txJson.description: Transaction JSON string (e.g. the TxJson field from a *_prepare result).

tools.name: xrpl_tx_prepare_generic
tools.description: Escape hatch: prepares any XRPL transaction described as a JSON object (TransactionType + fields). Autofills Sequence/Fee/LastLedgerSequence and returns unsigned blob + signing data. Use for tx types not covered by dedicated *_prepare tools (Escrow, NFToken, Check, PaymentChannel, AccountSet, …).

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

txJson.description: Raw transaction as a JSON object, e.g. {"TransactionType":"AccountSet","Account":"r...","SetFlag":8}.

humanSummary.description: Optional one-line human summary shown to the user in the approval prompt.

tools.name: xrpl_tx_simulate
tools.description: Dry-run a transaction without submitting. Runs xrpl_tx_preflight plus type-specific checks: for Payment, calls ripple_path_find to confirm a path exists for cross-currency / token deliveries and includes the first alternative's source_amount + paths_computed. Returns { preflight, suggestedPathfind, recommendedFee, recommendedLastLedgerSequence, warnings[] }. Useful for showing the user a realistic 'what will happen' before they approve a signature.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

tools.name: xrpl_tx_submit_signed
tools.description: Submits a SIGNED transaction blob to the network. The blob must already be signed locally — the server NEVER signs. Optionally polls until the transaction is included in a validated ledger.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

txBlobSigned.description: Signed transaction blob as a hex string. Produced locally by signing the tx_blob_unsigned returned by a *_prepare tool.

failHard.description: If true, do NOT retry or relay if the transaction fails locally (rippled fail_hard).

waitForValidation.description: If true, after submission poll for the transaction hash until it is in a validated ledger or LastLedgerSequence is reached.

pollIntervalSeconds.description: Polling interval in seconds when wait_for_validation is true. Default 2.

maxPolls.description: Max number of polls. Default 30 (≈60 seconds at default interval, longer than the LastLedgerSequence + 20 window).

tools.name: xrpl_unsubscribe
tools.description: Mirror of xrpl_subscribe — removes subscriptions from the pool's shared WebSocket. Same parameter shape.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.

accountsJson.description: JSON array of r-addresses to unsubscribe.

accountsProposedJson.description: JSON array of r-addresses to unsubscribe from the proposed stream.

tools.name: xrpl_wallet_address
tools.description: Returns metadata (address, public key, algorithm, creation time) for one wallet by name. No secrets are returned.

tools.name: xrpl_wallet_export
tools.description: Returns the plaintext seed and (optionally) the Xumm secret numbers for the wallet. Use this for BACKUP — the seed is the only way to recover the wallet later. The seed will appear in the MCP transcript, so handle the chat carefully. Requires explicit confirm=true to guard against accidental invocation.

confirm.description: Must be set to true to actually return the seed — a safety interlock.

tools.name: xrpl_wallet_generate
tools.description: Generates a brand-new XRPL wallet with random entropy, encrypts the seed with the keystore passphrase, and stores it under the given name. Returns address and public key. The seed is NEVER returned by this tool — use xrpl_wallet_export to back it up.

name.description: Wallet alias used in subsequent sign calls. Allowed chars: letters, digits, '-', '_', '.'.

tools.name: xrpl_wallet_import_mnemonic
tools.description: Imports a wallet from a BIP39 mnemonic phrase (12/15/18/21/24 words). Optionally a BIP44 derivation path and BIP39 passphrase. The mnemonic itself is converted to a seed and the seed is encrypted in the keystore.

mnemonic.description: BIP39 mnemonic — words separated by single spaces.

derivationPath.description: Optional BIP44 derivation path. Default: "m/44'/144'/0'/0/0" (XRPL standard).

bip39Passphrase.description: Optional BIP39 passphrase that augments the mnemonic. Empty by default.

algorithm.description: Optional algorithm override: 'ed25519' or 'secp256k1' (secp256k1 is the BIP39 default).

tools.name: xrpl_wallet_import_seed
tools.description: Imports an existing XRPL seed string (e.g. 'sEd...' for Ed25519, 'sn...' for secp256k1). Encrypted and stored under the given name.

seed.description: XRPL seed — typically starts with 'sEd' or 'sn'.

algorithm.description: Optional algorithm override. If omitted the SDK infers it from the seed prefix.

tools.name: xrpl_wallet_import_text
tools.description: Imports a wallet derived from an arbitrary text passphrase. The text is normalized and run through SHA-256 or PBKDF2 to produce 16 bytes of entropy. Useful for brain-wallets or human-memorable seeds. WARNING: short or low-entropy text is trivially brute-forceable — only use long, unique phrases.

text.description: The text — any length. Longer & more unique = better.

salt.description: Optional salt mixed into the KDF. Increases isolation between different wallets derived from similar text.

caseInsensitive.description: If true the text is lowercased before hashing — easier on humans, slightly weaker against typos vs intentional variants.

kdf.description: KDF: 'sha256' (default, fast) or 'pbkdf2' (slow, 100K iter, much harder to brute-force).

algorithm.description: Optional algorithm override: 'ed25519' or 'secp256k1'. Default: secp256k1.

tools.name: xrpl_wallet_import_xumm
tools.description: Imports a wallet from Xumm 'secret numbers' format (8 groups of 6 digits, each including a checksum). Accepts either an array of 8 strings or one space-separated string like '554872 394230 ... ...'.

secretNumbers.description: Either eight 6-digit strings (newline / space separated) or a JSON-style array. Whichever is convenient — the tool normalizes it.

algorithm.description: Optional algorithm override. Default: 'secp256k1' (Xumm's native curve).

tools.name: xrpl_wallet_list
tools.description: Lists all wallets in the keystore — name, address, public key, algorithm, creation timestamp. No secrets are returned.

tools.name: xrpl_wallet_remove
tools.description: Permanently deletes a wallet from the keystore. The encrypted seed is overwritten on disk via atomic rewrite — but if you have backups elsewhere they are not affected.

tools.name: xrpl_xrp_balance
tools.description: Convenience: returns the spendable XRP balance for an account, as a decimal XRP string.

network.description: Network identifier — 'mainnet', 'testnet', 'devnet' or a wss:// URL.
